sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n48231" key="qeo/mhtis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">θεό-μητις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ιδος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n48231.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">divinely wise</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">δίκη</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1475.tlg001:54" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Maiist.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">54</biblScope></bibl></cit>, cf. <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Suid.</author> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
